description: The customer service team needs a way to track support issues directly in Drupal. Configure a 'Support Ticket' content type (machine name: support_ticket) featuring a 'Related Order' entity reference field linked to Commerce Orders and a 'Priority' list (text) field with values: Low, Normal, High, and Critical. Create a test ticket titled 'Defective Battery' for user 'janesmith' assigned to a new order for her with 'High' priority. Provide an Admin View at '/admin/support-tickets' using a Table format that includes an exposed filter for Priority. Log in as admin (admin / Admin1234!).
